headline: Hi, I'm Faisal — a fullstack developer who turns ideas into real, working products.
body: For over five years I've built web and mobile apps, from the first sketch to release and real users. I believe good software isn't about stacking features — it's about answering a need clearly, reliably, and in a way people actually enjoy using. I take ownership of every project end to end: understanding the problem, shaping the solution, and making sure it runs smoothly in production.
